custom_css: h1 {transform: skewY(-7deg) !important; font-family: "Playwrite IT Moderna", cursive; letter-spacing: -2px; font-feature-settings: "liga" 1, "calt" 1; font-variant-ligatures: common-ligatures contextual; font-size: clamp(38px, 6vw, 52px); max-width: 55%; margin: auto; line-height: 100%; margin-top: -10px; mix-blend-mode: darken; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 100px; margin-top: 140px;}
h3 {font-family: "Figtree", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(12px, 6vw, 16px); font-weight: 300 !important; padding-right: 30px; padding-bottom: 10px;}
